refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets derived from mission inputs, stored in a traceable repository, and updated with baseline/calibration history logs.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic model mapping mission inputs to performance targets
Database schema and storage for performance requirements and history
Update management logic for baselines and calibration tracking
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic model mapping mission inputs to performance targets

potential_sources: Data dependencies between derivation and recording
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable with well-defined data handoffs; coupling is manageable via interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes mission context data is available and accurate
Risk that performance derivation algorithms may require frequent updates
Risk of data inconsistency if recording and update management are not well synchronized
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity grows.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives mission context and operational data inputs

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to operational planning

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update propagation

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the full performance requirement lifecycle.
Vehicle module is a consumer of performance targets but does not contain derivation or management.
Teleoperation uses performance data but does not own derivation or recording.
Safety Services is largely orthogonal to performance requirement derivation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution if all performance-related functions are centralized
Risk of interface overload on Network Link if update frequency is high
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and consider splitting update management into a submodule if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional decomposition is clear and DPs logically address each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing all performance functions in NGHE Solution may increase module complexity
High update frequency could stress Network Link interface
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as owner; other modules have low containment scores.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via system-level tests using Telemetry and Tasking interfaces to confirm traceability and update management.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider modularizing update management if complexity or diffusion risk increases
Validate interface load on Network Link during integration

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and allocation meets requirements and constraints with acceptable risks; no further decomposition needed at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Monitor update management complexity for potential modularization in future iterations

assumptions: Mission context data availability and accuracy
Stable interfaces for Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Performance data flow and update frequency metrics
Verification of traceability and history maintenance in system tests
